## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Kyle Gaudreau (Homebase) to discuss Marcel's career move and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel left his job to focus on fwd.digital, despite potential financial trade-offs](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [fwd.digital is gaining traction, with interest from high-profile individuals like Plaid's CEO](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [The company is at a crossroads between becoming a cash-generating agency or pursuing a more innovative path](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Marcel is organizing a CMO breakfast meetup on September 20th and invited Kyle](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Career Move

  - [Left current job to focus on fwd.digital full-time](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Potentially leaving "three million dollars on the table" if previous company raises Series C](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Acknowledges financial risk but sees upside potential](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Worst-case scenario: return to CMO role or explore other opportunities after a year](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

### fwd.digital's Current State and Potential

  - [Receiving positive signals and interest from industry leaders](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [CEO of Plaid (John Dennis) expressed interest after watching Marcel's webinar](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Potential for involvement from high-profile individuals](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Marcel surprised by the attention, given his non-technical background](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Agency vs. Innovation Dilemma

  - [Fork in the road: become a well-run, cash-generating agency or pursue innovation](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Agency path: focus on acquisition channels, client satisfaction, diversification, and margins](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Innovation path: explore unique approaches to automated workflows and AI integration](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Challenge: deciding on next steps and expansion strategy to diversify and de-risk the business](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)

### Automated Workflows and AI Integration

  - [Kyle believes many teams don't understand the full potential of automated workflows](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Adding AI creates new problem-solving opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Challenge: getting people to think in terms of automated workflows and AI possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Marcel appreciates Kyle's approach to breaking down complex concepts](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

### fwd.digital's Service Offerings

  - [Receiving requests for various growth-related services (lead magnets, newsletters, ABM)](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Developed a strong recruiting and vetting engine for talent acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Current model: improve processes with each new client, benefiting all clients](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Challenge: deciding which services to focus on and expand](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)

### Networking and Future Plans

  - [Marcel organizing a CMO breakfast meetup on September 20th (limited to 13 people)](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Invited Kyle to attend and register](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Both agreed to meet in person, potentially for a beer, to discuss further](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to register for the CMO breakfast meetup on September 20th](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Schedule an in-person meeting, potentially on a Friday](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Discuss potential ways Kyle can be helpful to Marcel and fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Continue exploring the agency vs. innovation path for fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Marcel to send Kyle the link for the CMO breakfast meetup](https://fathom.video/share/9aSwvPt8jBJx2ux9PH3_T1F4R-o63dRG?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
